codec 1.0.0

Data

Source: vignettes/data.Rmd
data.Rmd

hamilton_crime_risk

Average crime risk (2014-2020) at 2020 census blocks interpolated (population weighted) to 2010 census tracts.

Table schema:
name type title description
census_tract_id_2010 string
crime_total number
crime_personal number
crime_murder number
crime_rape number
crime_robbery number
crime_assualt number
crime_property number
crime_burglary number
crime_theft number
crime_motveh number
year number Represents 2014 - 2020 average

hamilton_drivetime

A census tract-level measure of drive time to Cincinnati Children’s Hospital Medical Center is derived using 6-minute interval drive time isochrones obtained from openroute service. Each tract-level drive time is an area-weighted average of drive times.

Table schema:
name type title description
census_tract_id_2010 string Census tract identifier
drive_time_avg number Average drivetime to CCHMC
year number Isochrones were obtained in 2022, but these rarely change over time (absent changes to major roadways)

hamilton_landcover

Greenspace, imperviousness, treecanopy, and greenness (EVI) for all tracts in Hamilton County

Table schema:
name type title description
census_tract_id_2010 string
pct_green_2019 number Percent Greenspace 2019 percent of pixels in each tract classified as green
pct_impervious_2019 number Percent Impervious 2019 average percent imperviousness for pixels in each tract
pct_treecanopy_2016 number Percent Treecanopy 2016 average percent tree canopy for pixels in each tract
evi_2018 number Enhanced Vegetation Index 2018 average enhanced vegetation index for pixels in each tract
year number Year The actual year is unique to each data product and denoted in the field names

hamilton_property_code_enforcement

Number of property code enforcements per household by census tract

Table schema:
name type title description
census_tract_id_2010 string census tract identifier
violations_per_household number number of property code enforcements per household
year number Year data year

hamilton_traffic

Number and fraction of parcels and households near traffic by census tract

Table schema:
name type title description
census_tract_id_2010 string
n_parcels integer Number of Parcels number of parcels in tract
n_parcels_near_traffic integer Number of Parcels Near Traffic number of parcels within 400 m of roads with non-zero average annual daily traffic
n_parcels_near_truck_traffic integer Number of Parcels Near Truck Traffic number of parcels within 400 m of roads with non-zero average annual daily truck traffic
n_households number Number of Households number of households in tract
n_households_near_traffic number Number of Households Near Traffic number of households within 400 m of roads with non-zero average annual daily traffic
n_households_near_truck_traffic number Number of Households Near Truck Traffic number of households within 400 m of roads with non-zero average annual daily truck traffic
median_parcel_traffic number Median Parcel Traffic median average annual daily traffic within 400 m of each parcel (vehicle-meters)
median_household_traffic number Median Household Traffic median average annual daily traffic within 400 m of each household (truck-meters)
median_parcel_truck_traffic number Median Parcel Truck Traffic median average annual daily truck traffic within 400 m of each parcel (vehicle-meters)
median_household_truck_traffic number Median Household Truck Traffic median average annual daily truck traffic within 400 m of each household (truck-meters)
frac_households_near_traffic number Fraction of Households Near Traffic fraction of households within 400 m of roads with non-zero average annual daily traffic
frac_parcels_near_traffic number Fraction of Parcels Near Traffic fraction of parcels within 400 m of roads with non-zero average annual daily traffic
frac_households_near_truck_traffic number Fraction of Households Near Truck Traffic fraction of households within 400 m of roads with non-zero average annual daily truck traffic
frac_parcels_near_truck_traffic number Fraction of Parcels Near Truck Traffic fraction of parcels within 400 m of roads with non-zero average annual daily truck traffic
year number

hh_acs_measures

2010 - 2021 measures derived from ACS variables for census tracts in the contiguous US

Table schema:
name type title description
census_tract_id_2010 string
year integer Year The year of the 5-year ACS estimates (e.g., the 2019 ACS covers 2015 - 2019)
fraction_poverty number Fraction of Households in Poverty Fraction of households with income below poverty level within the past 12 months
fraction_poverty_moe number
n_children_lt18 integer
n_children_lt18_moe integer
n_pop integer
n_pop_moe integer
n_household_lt18 integer
n_household_lt18_moe integer
n_household integer
n_household_moe integer
fraction_insured number Fraction of People Insured Fraction of population with health insurance (available from 2012 onwards only)
fraction_insured_moe number
fraction_snap number Fraction of Households Receiving Assisted Income Fraction of households receiving public assistance income or food stamps/SNAP in the past 12 months
fraction_snap_moe number
fraction_fam_nospouse number Fraction of family households with a single householder Single householder is male or female household, with no spouse present
fraction_fam_nospouse_moe number
fraction_employment number Fraction of People Employed Fraction of people employed in civilian labor force
fraction_employment_moe number
n_housing_units integer
n_housing_units_moe integer
median_home_value number Median Value of Owner-Occupied Housing Units
median_home_value_moe number
median_home_value_2010adj number Median Value of Owner-Occupied Housing Units (in 2010 USD)
fraction_housing_renters number Fraction of Housing Units Occupied by Renters fraction denominator is number of occupied housing units
fraction_housing_renters_moe number
median_rent_to_income_percentage number Median Rent to Income Percentage The median of the percentage of rent to income among all renter-occupied housing units
median_rent_to_income_percentage_moe number
fraction_high_rent number Fraction of Housing Units Paying at least 30% of Income on Rent
fraction_high_rent_moe number
fraction_conditions number Fraction of Housing Units with Substandard Housing Conditions substandard housing: incomplete plumbing or kitchens, overcrowding, 30% or more of household income spent on rent or owner costs
fraction_conditions_moe number
fraction_builtbf1970 number Fraction of Housing Units Built Before 1970
fraction_builtbf1970_moe number
fraction_vacant number Fraction of Housing Units that are Vacant
fraction_vacant_moe number
fraction_nhl number Fraction of People Not Hispanic/Latino
fraction_nhl_moe number
fraction_nhl_w number Fraction of People White and Not Hispanic/Latino
fraction_nhl_w_moe number
fraction_nhl_b number Fraction of People Black and Not Hispanic/Latino
fraction_nhl_b_moe number
fraction_nhl_o number Fraction of People Not Black, Not White, and Not Hispanic/Latino
fraction_nhl_o_moe number
fraction_hl number Fraction of People Hispanic/Latino
fraction_hl_moe number
fraction_hl_w number Fraction of People White and Hispanic/Latino
fraction_hl_w_moe number
fraction_hl_b number Fraction of People Black and Hispanic/Latino
fraction_hl_b_moe number
fraction_hl_o number Fraction of People Not Black, Not White, and Hispanic/Latino
fraction_hl_o_moe number
fraction_lesh number Fraction of Households Speaking Limited English Available from 2016 onwards
fraction_lesh_moe number
median_income number Median Household Income
median_income_moe number
median_income_2010adj number Median Household Income (in 2010 USD)
fraction_hs number Fraction of Adults with At Least High School Education Available from 2012 onwards
fraction_hs_moe number

tract_indices

A collection of census-derived indices for all census tracts in the U.S.

Table schema:
name type title description
census_tract_id_2010 string
adi number Neighborhood Atlas Area Deprivation Index national percentile ranking at block group level from 1 to 100 averaged for each tract; higher adi indicates higher disadvantage (2019)
coi_education number Child Opportunity Index Education Domain weighted average of education domain component indicator z-scores, nationally normed (2015)
coi_health_env number Child Opportunity Index Health and Environment Domain weighted average of health and environment domain component indicator z-scores, nationally normed (2015)
coi_social_econ number Child Opportunity Index Social and Economic Domain weighted average of social and economic domain component indicator z-scores, nationally normed (2015)
coi number Child Opportunity Index weighted average of three domain averaged z-scores, nationally normed (2015)
dep_index_fraction_assisted_income number Fraction Assisted Income fraction of households receiving public assistance income or food stamps or SNAP in the past 12 months (2018)
dep_index_fraction_high_school_edu number Fraction High School Education fraction of population 25 and older with educational attainment of at least high school graduation (includes GED equivalency) (2018)
dep_index_median_income number Median Household Income median household income in the past 12 months in 2018 inflation-adjusted dollars (2018)
dep_index_fraction_no_health_ins number Fraction No Health Insurance fraction of poulation with no health insurance coverage (2018)
dep_index_fraction_poverty number Fraction Poverty fraction of population with income in past 12 months below poverty level (2018)
dep_index_fraction_vacant_housing number Fraction Vacant Housing fraction of houses that are vacant (2018)
dep_index number Material Deprivation Index composite index of 6 variables above characterizing community material deprivation; range 0 to 1, with higher values indicating higher deprivation (2018)
lead_paint number Lead Paint Indicator percent of housing units built pre-1960 (2019)
diesel_pm number Diesel PM Concentration concentration of diesel particulate matter in air (ug/m3) (2017)
cancer_risk number Cancer Risk lifetime cancer risk from inhalation of air toxics (2017)
resp_hazard_ind number Respiratory Hazard Index air toxics respiratory hazard index; ratio of exposure concentration to health-based reference concentration (2017)
traffic_proximity number Traffic Proximity and Volume Count of vehicles (AADT, avg. annual daily traffic) at major roads within 500 meters, divided by distance in meters (2019)
major_discharger_water number Major Direct Dischargers to Water Indicator RSEI modeled toxic concentrations at stream segments within 500 m divided by distance in km (2021)
nat_priority_proximity number Proximity to NPL Sites count of proposed or listed National Priority List (a.k.a. superfund) sites within 5 km (or nearest one beyond 5 km) (2021)
risk_management_proximity number Proximity to RMP Facilities count of Risk Management Plan (potential chemical accident management plan) facilities within 5 km (or nearest one beyond 5 km), each divided by distance in km (2021)
disposal_proximity number Proximity to TSDF Facilities count of hazardous waste facilities (Treatment Storage and Disposal Facilities and LQGs) within 5 km (or nearest beyond 5 km), each divided by distance in km (2021)
ozone_conc number Ozone Cocentration ozone seasonal average of daily maximum 8-hour concentration (ppb) (2018)
pm_conc number PM Concentration annual average PM2.5 level in air (ug/m3) (2018)
low_food_access_flag boolean Low Food Access Flag TRUE if tract has at least 500 people or at least 33% of the tract population living more than 1 mile from nearest food store in urban areas, or more than 10 miles in rural areas (2019)
low_food_access_pct number Low Food Access Percentage percent of tract population living more than 1 mile from nearest food store in urban areas, or more than 10 miles in rural areas (2019)
food_insecurity_pct number Food Insecurity Percentage estimated percentage of population in food insecure households (2019)
hpsa_mh boolean Mental Health Professional Shortage Area
hpsa_pc boolean Primary Care Professional Shortage Area
ice number Racial Economic Index of Concentration at the Extremes high income white non-Hispanic households versus low income people of color (not white non-Hispanic) households; -1 to 1 where 1 indicates all high income white households and -1 indicates all low income people of color households (2019)
pct_crowding number Percent Crowding percent of households with greater than 1 person per room (2019)
mrfei number Modified Retail Food Environment Index percentage of healthy food retailers (2011)
mua boolean Medically Underserved Area
pct_1or2_risk_factors number Percent 1 or 2 Community Resilience Risk Factors Rate of individuals with one to two community resilience risk factors (2019)
pct_3ormore_risk_factors number Percent 3 or More Community Resilience Risk Factors Rate of individuals with three or more community resilience risk factors (2019)
sdi number Social Deprivation Index Social Deprivation Index Score 1-100 (2015)
svi_socioeconomic number Social Vulnerability Index Socioeconomic Theme percentile ranking 0 to 1 for socioeconomic theme (2018)
svi_household_comp number Social Vulnerability Index Household Composition Theme percentile ranking 0 to 1 for household composition theme (2018)
svi_minority number Social Vulnerability Index Minority Theme percentile ranking 0 to 1 for minority status/language theme (2018)
svi_housing_transportation number Social Vulnerability Index Housing and Transportation Theme percentile ranking 0 to 1 for housing type/transportation theme (2018)
svi number Social Vulnerability Index overall social vulnerability percentile ranking 0 to 1 (2018)
walkability_index number Walkability Index national percentile rankings at the block group level from 1 to 20 averaged for each tract; 1 is least walkable, 20 is most walkable; accounts for intersection density, proximity to transit stops, employment mix, and employment/household mix (2021)
year number

On this page

Developed by Cole Brokamp, Erika Manning, Andrew Vancil.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
